title: webhook — compliance evidence
description: Webhook signing is the primary integrity control (proves the request came from us, not a spoofer). Rotation grace is the primary availability control for secret changes. Auto-disable + probes are operational reliability. Audit trail covers SOC 2 + ISO 27001 + GDPR Art. 30 records-of-processing.

controls.evidence: Customer webhook receivers ARE subprocessors from the tenant's perspective (they receive tenant data). The subprocessors.json entry documents the mechanism; the customer's receiver is not itself listed — that's the tenant's own contractual concern with their receiver.

audit_log rows for every subscription lifecycle transition + secret rotation + admin action, retained 7y cold. HasVersions on WebhookSubscription captures the exact configuration at every point in time.

HMAC-SHA256 signing on every outbound. Rotation grace window prevents downtime during key rotation. Signing secrets encrypted at rest via AWS KMS. TLS 1.3 for all HTTPS destinations. mTLS destination available for high-security receivers.
WebhookSecretRotated event fires immediately on rotation. Rotations spike during incident response — audit trail correlates to breach timeline.
policies.json restricts subscription CRUD to tenant admins + rotate-secret to owners. Signing secrets never returned by API except once at creation/rotation.
TLS 1.3 on HTTPS destinations; mTLS available. verify_ssl column allows only dev-mode bypass.
health.json + metrics.json + WebhookProbeJob + WebhookProbeFailed event. Deliveries-oldest-pending probe detects worker starvation.
feature-flags.json ships 12 kill switches. Emergency pause via platform-admin endpoint. All ops actions audit-logged.
HasVersions on WebhookSubscription. Every edit produces a rollback-capable snapshot. Audit rows track actor + timestamp + changed_fields.
WebhookSubscription config changes captured as HasVersions snapshots + audit rows.
HMAC-SHA256 + secret rotation with grace window + KMS encryption at rest.
audit_log retention 7y cold + real-time metrics + WebhookProbeFailed alerting.

pci_dss.note: When a tenant integration processes cardholder data, webhook is in scope for PCI-DSS Req 10 (logging + monitoring). Retention of at least 1 year (config default 30d + enterprise entitlement extends).

controls.evidence: TLS 1.3 mandatory; verify_ssl=false refused in production (config guard).
HMAC-SHA256 with 32-byte random secret. Rotation grace supports proper key rotation.
audit_log + WebhookDelivery + enterprise entitlement retention_days=365 satisfies Req 10.7 one-year retention.
